#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Security.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Security')

## PayloadProtectionState Enum

Provider-neutral protection state for event payloads and snapshots\.

```csharp
public enum PayloadProtectionState
```

| Name | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `Unprotected` | Payload or snapshot state is explicitly unprotected\. |
| `Protected` | Payload or snapshot state was transformed by a provider and requires metadata such as `Scheme`\. |
| `ProviderOpaque` | EventStore cannot safely interpret the payload or snapshot metadata and must carry it without unprotecting by inference\. |
